Because the model codes a single individual for none, one, or more than one HCC, the CMS-HCC model can individually 
price tens of thousands of distinct clinical profiles. The model’s structure thus provides, and predicts from, a detailed 
comprehensive clinical profile for each individual. An evaluation of the CMS risk models is publicly available on the 
CMS website.26 

26 Pope GC, Kautter J, Ingber MJ, et al.
